title: Pool Salt Conversion Update and SPD Helio Health Mental Health Training RFP
summary: Parks Commissioner Sasha Bur presents item 23: $2,000 payment to Sundance Leisure for pool saltwater system repair (FY2025), with March 11 training scheduled. Deputy Chief Tom (SPD) presents items 24-25: Helio Health selected via RFP for officer mental health awareness training (item 24) and crisis evaluation services (item 25). Previous evaluator Dr. Bernard severed due to conflicts of interest. Council President Paniagua expresses reservations about Helio Health's reputation, citing poor performance in wraparound housing services. SPD defends selection based on RFP results, local presence, and separation of evaluation staff from co-responder field staff.

department_refs: Department of Parks, Recreation and Youth Programs

political_signal.description: Council President Paniagua questions Helio Health's reputation and capacity, citing poor performance in housing wraparound services.

processing_notes: IT detection is false positive from 'IT connection in the pools' context. Helio Health is a local behavioral health provider also involved in co-responder programs with SPD.
Segment 6 of 14 from Common Council Study Session, Wednesday March 4th 2026
Transcript corrections applied: SU -> Syracuse University
